ksa_text: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the Chief Data Scientist, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.511) and conceptual alignment to include at the c suite level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.511). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Chief Data Scientist versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Chief Data Scientist.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.511. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Chief Data Scientist.
